programs.title: House Hunters Australia
programs.desc: Bridget wants a Hamptons-style cottage with a pool, while Paul seeks a home with character and a toolshed; will they find their dream home?

programs.title: House Hunters Australia
programs.desc: Matt seeks a workshop for his many projects, while Mel dreams of a spacious, character-filled home with guest accommodation; together, they search for a property that fits both visions.

programs.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programs.desc: Deep in the French countryside, a local expert helps a mother and daughter duo hunt bargain properties in Carcassonne; mom's looking to start a new life in a beautiful home and the search includes medieval castles, antique fairs, and some fine cheese.

programs.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programs.desc: On the northwest coast of Spain, a relocation expert guides a young couple searching for a dream bargain home in Galicia; they're taking in all the local culture of the region as they enjoy the natural thermal spas and learn how to make cheese!

programs.title: House Hunters International
programs.desc: After eight years together in Montreal, a creative couple looks to refocus on growing their art in Copenhagen, Denmark. They're looking for a modern apartment near the city center, but with a small budget, they may need to compromise on location.

programs.title: House Hunters Australia
programs.desc: Clare and her best friend Brid are on a mission to find Clare's family a home in Western Sydney. Clare wants room for her kids to grow, while eagle-eyed Brid focuses on the little details.
